zh.title: 艾达币/美元技术分析：弱势震荡偏空整理
zh.content:
当前艾达币对美元整体处于弱势震荡格局，价格持续运行在20日均线0.1835下方，短线反弹力度不足，市场买盘承接有限，整体结构仍偏向下行整理阶段，尚未出现有效反转信号。

技术指标方面，MACD虽维持微弱正值0.0007附近，但动能柱体偏弱，缺乏持续放量支撑；同时RSI数据缺失，使得超买超卖状态难以确认，整体动量表现偏疲软，趋势延续性不足。

支撑与阻力结构清晰，下方关键支撑位于0.1780一线，若失守可能进一步下探0.1760区域；上方阻力集中在0.1792及0.1835均线附近，需放量突破才能扭转短期弱势结构。

交易策略建议以区间震荡思路为主，在未有效站上0.1835之前不宜追多，靠近阻力区可考虑轻仓试空，下破支撑后可顺势跟随空头趋势，但需严格控制风险。

en.title: Cardano vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
ADA/USD is trading around 0.1785, slightly below recent intraday range and consistently under the 20-day SMA at 0.1835, indicating a short-term bearish bias. Price action has compressed near local lows after repeated failures to reclaim 0.18–0.183 zone. Overall structure suggests weak momentum and a consolidation-to-downside drift rather than trend reversal, with sellers still controlling minor rallies. Market sentiment remains cautious as volatility contracts.

MACD reading at 0.000745 suggests a very mild bullish crossover bias, but the absence of a signal line value limits confirmation strength. With RSI unavailable, momentum assessment relies on price structure, which still shows weakness below the SMA(20). This divergence indicates early stabilization attempts, yet insufficient conviction for trend reversal. Overall indicators point to neutral-to-slightly bearish momentum. Volume confirmation would be required to validate any upward continuation.

Immediate support is forming around 0.1780, with a deeper floor near 0.1750 if selling pressure accelerates. On the upside, resistance is clearly aligned with the 20-day SMA at 0.1835, followed by stronger rejection near 0.1850. Until price reclaims the SMA, rallies are likely to be sold. Traders may consider range-bound scalping between support and resistance with tight risk management. Breakouts require confirmation above 0.1850 for bullish continuation.

Overall outlook remains mildly bearish to neutral, with ADA/USD stuck below key moving average resistance and lacking strong momentum. The broader structure favors accumulation rather than trend expansion, but no clear reversal signal has emerged. Conservative traders may wait for a decisive break above 0.1835–0.1850 or rejection breakdown below 0.1750 before committing to directional positions. Risk control remains essential in this low-volatility environment.
